value="PythonWeather — Sequenzdiagramm" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="450" x="450" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="shape=umlActor;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;html=1;outlineConnect=0;" value="Benutzer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="30" x="80" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main_obj" parent="1" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="720" width="10" x="255" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fetcher_act" parent="1" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="10" x="495" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_act" parent="1" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="10" x="735" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="proc_act" parent="1" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="10" x="975" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="exp_act" parent="1" style="html=1;points=[];perimeter=orthogonalPerimeter;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="10" x="1205" y="670" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg1" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;" value="python main.py &lt;cities&gt;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="95" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="255" y="150" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg2" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;curved=1;" value="parse_args()"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.3" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="310" y="165" /> <mxPoint x="310" y="180" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="265" y="165" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="265" y="180" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg3" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;" value="fetch_multiple(cities)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="265" y="195" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="495" y="195" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop1" parent="1" style="shape=umlFrame;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;width=140;height=20;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;" value="loop [für jede Stadt]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="510" x="280" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg4" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;" value="client.get(city)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="505" y="245" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="735" y="245" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg5" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=1;rounded=0;" value="Forecast"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="735" y="310" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="505" y="310" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg6" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=1;rounded=0;" value="dict[str, Forecast]"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="495" y="400" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="265" y="400" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop2" parent="1" style="shape=umlFrame;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;width=180;height=20;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;fontSize=10;" value="loop [für jede Stadt in results]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="970" x="280" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg7" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;" value="process_current_weather(forecast)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="265" y="445" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="975" y="445" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg8" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=1;rounded=0;" value="dict (current_data)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="975" y="480" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="265" y="480" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg9" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;" value="process_daily_forecasts(forecast)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="265" y="510" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="975" y="510" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg10" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=1;rounded=0;" value="list[dict] (daily_data)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="975" y="545" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="265" y="545" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg11" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;" value="process_hourly_forecasts(forecast)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="265" y="575" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="975" y="575" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg12" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=1;rounded=0;" value="list[dict] (hourly_data)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="975" y="610" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="265" y="610" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg13" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=block;endFill=1;rounded=0;" value="export(city, current_data, daily_data, hourly_data)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="265" y="680" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1205" y="680" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note1" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;size=14;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="1. _create_current_weather_sheet()<br>2. _create_forecast_sheet()<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;- _add_temperature_chart()<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;- _add_hourly_temp_precip_chart()<br>3. wb.save()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="250" x="1230" y="700" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg14" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=1;rounded=0;" value="filepath (str)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1205" y="810" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="265" y="810" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="msg15" edge="1" parent="1" style="html=1;verticalAlign=bottom;endArrow=open;endFill=0;dashed=1;rounded=0;" value="&quot;Excel-Datei erstellt: ...&quot;"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="255" y="845" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="95" y="845" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
